topOfMind.summary: Actively engaged in regular LeetCode daily practice with verified account (username: aaanan-ren-pi-fa-shang-wang-jie-gong-bu-ying-qiu). On April 21, 2026, completed 9 unique problems including Daily Challenge #1722 Minimize Hamming Distance After Swap Operations (Medium), alongside Sliding Window Maximum (Hard), Set Matrix Zeroes, Merge Intervals, Maximum Subarray, Product of Array Except Self, Smallest String With Swaps, Maximize Alternating Sum Using Swaps, and Longest Continuous Subarray With Absolute Diff Less Than or Equal to Limit. Currently working on parallel technical development: implemented Quicksort algorithm with both recursive and in-place versions at /mnt/user-data/workspace/quicksort.py, created LeetCode timestamp skill at /mnt/user-data/workspace/get-leetcode-timestamp.md that calculates UTC timestamps with East 8 timezone correction, and recently completed comprehensive research report on DeerFlow AI Agent framework developed by ByteDance (released early 2026, built on LangGraph with supervisor-based orchestration pattern). Recently requested agent capability documentation/reports to understand agent system functionality. Continues maintaining strong technical focus with emphasis on medium-difficulty algorithmic problems while demonstrating proficiency across diverse topics including array manipulation, graph traversal, dynamic programming, two pointers, hash tables, prefix sum, BFS, binary search, and monotonic stack techniques.

recentMonths.summary: Consistent LeetCode daily practice routine established since early April 2026, with focus on algorithmic problem-solving at medium difficulty level. Successfully retrieved actual LeetCode account data showing extensive problem-solving activity. On April 15, 2026, user completed 6 problems covering diverse topics including Dynamic Programming, DFS/Tree traversal, Topological Sort, Backtracking, and Greedy algorithms. On April 16, 2026, user tackled Binary Tree Maximum Path Sum (HARD). On April 17, 2026, user completed Word Break and Minimum Absolute Distance Between Mirror Pairs (MEDIUM). On April 19, 2026, user completed 10 unique problems with 18 total submissions including Multi Source Flood Fill, Smallest Stable Index I/II, Maximum Distance Between a Pair of Values (Daily Challenge #1855), Subarray Sum Equals K, Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters, Mirror Distance of an Integer, Trapping Rain Water, 3Sum, Container With Most Water, and Move Zeroes. On April 21, 2026, user continued the streak with 9 unique problems including Daily Challenge #1722 Minimize Hamming Distance After Swap Operations, Sliding Window Maximum (Hard), along with Set Matrix Zeroes, Merge Intervals, Maximum Subarray, Product of Array Except Self, Smallest String With Swaps, Maximize Alternating Sum Using Swaps, and Longest Continuous Subarray With Absolute Diff Less Than or Equal to Limit. Recently expanded to generating comprehensive daily markdown summaries with problem analysis, complexity details, and planning components. When GitHub commit authentication failed, user accepted fallback to local outputs directory storage. Most recently developed Quicksort algorithm with dual implementations and LeetCode timestamp skill with East 8 timezone correction functionality, with both tasks successfully completed despite initial YAML frontmatter requirements and permission limitations. Completed comprehensive research report on DeerFlow AI Agent framework (ByteDance's open-source SuperAgent framework built on LangGraph, released early 2026) with detailed analysis of supervisor-based orchestration patterns and multi-agent systems.
